title: Patch or virtually patch payment API edge framework
playbook: Emergency change with WAF validation, deploy canary, external retest, and business sign-off.

title: Revoke leaked deployment token and constrain CI permissions
playbook: Revoke token, rotate dependent secrets, scope deployment permissions, and add secret revocation automation.
dependency: Payments release owner to approve token rotation window

title: Move privileged groups to phishing-resistant MFA
playbook: Require hardware-backed MFA for privileged groups, publish exception path, and retest sign-in policy.
dependency: Contractor communications and hardware key distribution

title: Segment CI runner egress from production data subnet
playbook: Apply least-privilege egress rule, add policy-as-code guardrail, and rerun cloud reachability validation.
dependency: CI job inventory to avoid breaking production deployments

title: Enable HSTS on marketing site
playbook: Apply CDN header policy and monitor browser preload readiness.

title: Patch isolated engineering wiki library
playbook: Patch in routine maintenance unless exploit activity or reachability changes.
